data.title: Celebrate Mardi Gras with Big Easy Whiskey's nationwide delivery of cocktails & King Cakes. No need to be in NOLA.
data.description: Big Easy Whiskey is offering nationwide delivery to bring the taste of New Orleans to Mardi Gras celebrations across the country. Starting January 22, 2026, people can enjoy the unique flavor of New Orleans from the comfort of their homes. Whether residing far from the French Quarter or unable to travel, individuals now have the opportunity to savor the essence of Mardi Gras with Big Easy Whiskey. This service caters to customers nationwide, delivering the spirit of New Orleans directly to their doorsteps. Celebrate Mardi Gras no matter where you are with the help of Big Easy Whiskey's convenient delivery option.

data.title: FlashLabs unveils Chroma 1.0, first open-source real-time voice AI model. Released on Jan 22, 2026.
data.description: In San Francisco on January 22, 2026, FlashLabs, a research and engineering lab specializing in applied artificial intelligence (AI), unveiled Chroma 1.0. This revolutionary release marks the debut of the world's initial open-source, end-to-end, real-time speech-to-speech AI model featuring personalized voice cloning. FlashLabs' breakthrough technology promises to transform communication dynamics thanks to its cutting-edge capabilities.

data.title: Integrity Wealth and Humilis Investment Strategies partner, offering 5 SMA models and proprietary research to advisors.
data.description: Integrity, LLC ("Integrity") has formed a strategic partnership with Brian Belski's Humilis Investment Strategies to provide Integrity Wealth advisors with access to five separate SMA models. This collaboration will also grant advisors access to exclusive proprietary research. The partnership, announced on January 22, 2026, aims to enhance the services offered to Integrity Wealth clients by leveraging the expertise and resources of Humilis Investment Strategies. This new venture underscores Integrity's commitment to expanding its offerings and positioning itself as a leader in the wealth management sector.

data.title: BeyondTrucks obtains SOC 2 Type II certification for strong security in supply chain, with highest enterprise-grade protection.
data.description: BeyondTrucks has been awarded SOC 2 Type II certification, affirming its strong security measures in safeguarding supply chain, shipment data, and customer business insights. This certification underscores the San Francisco-based company's commitment to ensuring the protection of critical information. Through their platform utilizing AI technology for truck dispatch planning and management, BeyondTrucks prioritizes the security of data, enhancing customer trust.

data.title: Earth's climate swings without ice sheets linked to orbital wobbles, new study finds. Jan. 22, 2026 BEIJING - Precession cycles drive abrupt changes.
data.description: Recent research conducted by a team of scientists from China has shed light on the sudden climate fluctuations in ancient ice-free environments. The study, released on January 22, 2026, revealed that Earth's gradual axial wobbles, referred to as precession cycles, not only influence extended climate patterns but also played a significant role in the past unpredictable climate shifts. These findings are crucial as they provide valuable insights for projecting future warming scenarios. The study's outcomes offer a deeper understanding of the mechanisms behind climate changes and highlight the importance of considering precession cycles in climate models moving forward.

data.title: New data shows boutique law firms can compete with larger rivals by focusing on digital infrastructure, not mass media.
data.description: In Waco, Texas on January 22, 2026, recent data shows that boutique law firms can successfully rival larger competitors by focusing on robust technical digital systems rather than extensive mass-marketing strategies. This revelation comes from recent performance numbers, showcasing the effectiveness of this approach. Rule Your Kingdom (RYK), a digital marketing agency, has been at the forefront of this trend...

data.title: Susan Lipp named NAMM Female Entrepreneur of the Year at 2026 She Rocks Awards for Full Compass Systems.
data.description: On January 22, 2026, in Madison, Wisconsin, Full Compass Systems revealed that Susan Lipp, the company's Chairman, has been selected as the NAMM Female Entrepreneur of the Year. She is set to receive this recognition at the upcoming 2026 She Rocks Awards, hosted by the Women's International Music Network at the NAMM Show.

data.title: Demand for private financing in Arizona real estate rising drastically; Hard Money Lenders founder Michael Iuculano witnessing surge in interest.
data.description: On January 22, 2026, in Phoenix, the real estate market in Arizona is experiencing a notable shift with a growing demand for quick and adaptable private financing. Michael Iuculano, the creator of Hard Money Lenders Arizona, is witnessing this surge first-hand. Investors, builders, and developers in the region are increasingly seeking alternative financing solutions due to the rapidly changing market conditions. The need for flexible funding options is reaching unprecedented levels, emphasizing the importance of reliable and expedient financial support for individuals and businesses in the real estate sector.
U.S. PRESIDENT TRUMP DEPARTS FROM ZURICH AIRPORT Trump has concluded an eventful stay in Davos and his motorcade is heading to the airport in Zurich for his flight back to Washington.

data.title: ICRF and CRI co-fund grant to address immunotherapy resistance in melanoma led by Asaf Madi, PhD. – Tel Aviv University.
data.description: A recent study overseen by Dr. Asaf Madi from Tel Aviv University aims to enhance the effectiveness and longevity of TIL therapy for individuals facing advanced illnesses. In an announcement made on January 22, 2026, in New York, the Israel Cancer Research Fund (ICRF) and the Cancer Research Institute (CRI) disclosed their collaboration on a fresh award. This initiative seeks to boost the reliability and durability of TIL therapy for patients, highlighting the commitment to advancing cancer treatment options.

data.title: XTI Aerospace shareholders elect Clinton J. Weber to board of directors focused on scaling Drone Nerds, subsidiary.
data.description: On January 22, 2026, in Englewood, Colorado, XTI Aerospace, Inc. (Nasdaq: XTIA) announced its strategic initiative to develop and expand its recently acquired subsidiary, Drone Nerds, LLC. XTI, an aerospace technology company, aims to bolster its unmanned aircraft system offerings through this acquisition.

data.title: XED gets in-principle approval from NSE IX for $12 million IPO at GIFT City, signaling a major development.
data.description: XED, a leading executive education organization operating worldwide, has recently obtained provisional clearance from NSE International Exchange (NSE IX) for its planned IPO valued at $12 million in GIFT City. This development signifies a major achievement for the company as it moves forward with its financial strategic plans.

data.title: Quants increasingly use sector-specific data as AI adoption evolves, per Bloomberg survey of 150+ professionals.
data.description: A recent survey conducted on over 150 professionals including quants, research analysts, and data scientists has delved into the utilization of AI within investment research processes. The survey, conducted in New York on January 22, 2026, revealed that as companies delve into integrating artificial intelligence into their investment research workflows, quantitative teams are actively embracing this technological advancement. The findings shed light on the growing adoption of AI technologies within the investment sector, showcasing a shift towards data-driven decision-making processes.

data.title: Growfin partners with Credit Pulse in Wilmington, aiming to transform cash flow and credit risk management with AI, AR automation.
data.description: Credit Pulse and Growfin have joined forces to revolutionize the credit-to-cash lifecycle. The collaboration, disclosed on January 22, 2026, in Wilmington, Del., marks a pivotal moment in the accounts receivable industry. Growfin, renowned for its AI-driven AR automation solutions, is spearheading the alliance. This partnership is expected to disrupt the sector by integrating advanced credit intelligence with automation. The move symbolizes a step toward efficiency and innovation in managing cash flows.

data.title: Cinemark hosts Oscars Movie Week Festival from March 9-15, featuring Best Picture, Short Films for film enthusiasts.
data.description: Cinemark Holdings, Inc., a leading theatrical exhibition company, is hosting its annual Oscars® Movie Week festival from March 9 to March 15. This event offers movie enthusiasts across the nation the opportunity to experience top Hollywood storytelling. The festival will feature select films from categories like Best Picture, Live Action Short Film, and Animated Short Film, providing an immersive cinematic experience in Cinemark auditoriums. Attendees can enjoy the festival's offerings during this week-long celebration of exceptional filmmaking.

data.title: Mirion (MIR) to release Q4 and Full Year 2025 results on Feb 10, 2026, followed by a conference call on Feb 11, 2026, at 11:00 am ET.
data.description: Mirion (NYSE: MIR) will unveil its financial performance for Q4 and FY2025 after the market closes on Tuesday, February 10, 2026. The company is set to hold a conference call on Wednesday, February 11, 2026, at 11:00 am ET to review the results. To join the call, participants can dial 1-877-407-9208 or 1-201-493-6784 and request access to the Mirion Technologies, Inc. earnings call. Additionally, a live webcast will be available for those unable to join via phone.

data.title: Bombora partners with Proximic by Comscore to add 300 new B2B predictive audiences. Unlocking B2B value for stakeholders.
data.description: In New York, Bombora, a leading B2B data company, revealed a collaboration with Proximic by Comscore to introduce 300 fresh contextual audience categories leveraging Bombora’s exclusive B2B data. This partnership underscores Bombora's crucial role in maximizing the B2B industry's worth. Advertisers can now tap into these 300 new Proximic by Comscore Predictive Audiences, which are B2B contextual segments integrated with Bombora's proprietary data.

data.title: Kustom Entertainment, Inc. is divesting its video solutions division, entering an MOU with Cycurion, Inc. (Nasdaq: CYCU).
data.description: On January 22, 2026, Kustom Entertainment, Inc. revealed that it has signed a non-binding Memorandum of Understanding with Cycurion, Inc. to sell off its video solutions division. This move comes as part of the Company's strategic shift towards emphasizing its live event production and online ticketing operations, which have been experiencing significant growth. The rebranding efforts also include a new Nasdaq ticker symbol "KUST". Kustom Entertainment is listed on Nasdaq as KUST, while Cycurion, Inc. trades under the ticker symbol CYCU. This decision underscores the Company's commitment to capitalizing on its high-performing sectors and enhancing its market positioning.

data.title: Circle introduces crosschain forwarding service for CCTP integration, reducing USDC transfer times by 50-200% across 14 chains.
data.description: Circle has introduced a new forwarding service aimed at streamlining USDC transfers by eliminating the need for manual attestation retrieval. This service results in significantly faster crosschain transfer times, with improvements ranging from 50% to 200% across a total of 14 different chains.
